title: my-subagent config
description: Model pool and API configuration for my-subagent. Copy to ~/.config/agent-skills/my-subagent/config.json and fill in credentials.

active.description: Active profile name. Overridden by --profile CLI flag.

api_base.description: LiteLLM or compatible API base URL (e.g. http://host:4000).

pool.description: Model names available for dispatch. Tasks are distributed evenly across the pool.

effort.description: Default reasoning effort level for dispatched tasks.
